name: Sea of Galilee
oracleText:
Sea of Galilee enters the battlefield tapped.
{T}: Add {U} or {G}.
Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, scry 1.
{2}, {T}: Draw a card, then discard a card.
flavorText: "What manner of man is this!" — Matthew 8:27
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; mechanics, colors, and art sourcing remain pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. First-pass mechanics added in this pass; mana, colors, and rules text remain provisional. Classics theme art uses Rembrandt's "The Storm on the Sea of Galilee" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: Waters of Wonder

classics.license: Public domain; Wikimedia Commons hosts a faithful reproduction of a public-domain work.
classics.creditText: Rembrandt, The Storm on the Sea of Galilee
classics.sourceNotes: The most iconic Galilee image gives the waters card strong old-master drama.
